name: Los Caminos de la Mar — Circular desde cala Granadella por sendas al Río Gorgos
region_intro: Mountain biking around Jávea/Xàbia offers diverse landscapes, blending coastal and mountainous terrain. The region features an extensive network of trails, including coastal singletracks, routes through pine forests, and rocky climbs. Riders can explore the imposing Montgó Natural Park and the Granadella Forest Park, which provide varied experiences for different skill levels. The terrain includes everything from flat routes to demanding trails with significant elevation changes. Best mountain bike trails around Jávea/Xàbia The most popular mountain bike trail is Los Caminos de la Mar — Circular desde cala Granadella por sendas al Río Gorgos, a difficult 33.5 miles (54.0 km) trail that takes 4 hours 34 minutes to complete. This route explores the varied terrain from Cala Granadella towards the Río Gorgos. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Cala Blanca – Cap Negre Viewpoint loop from Xàbia / Jávea, a moderate 19.6 miles (31.6 km) path. This route offers coastal views and passes by notable viewpoints. Local mountain bikers also love the Moraira Beaches and Promenade – View of Peñón de Ifach loop from Parque Villas, a 36.0 miles (57.9 km) trail leading through coastal areas and offering views of Peñón de Ifach, often completed in about 3 hours 56 minutes. Mountain biking around Jávea/Xàbia is defined by coastal singletracks, pine forests, and rocky climbs. The network offers options for different ability levels, from easy family routes to advanced technical trails. The routes in Jávea/Xàbia are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.4 stars from over 90 reviews. More than 1000 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Jávea/Xàbia's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are there in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: Jávea/Xàbia offers a wide selection of mountain bike trails, with over 60 routes available on komoot. These range from easy paths to challenging technical rides.

Q: What is the best time of year for mountain biking in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: The pleasant climate with mild temperatures makes Jávea/Xàbia a year-round destination for mountain bikers. Spring and autumn are particularly enjoyable, offering ideal conditions for exploring the trails.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: You can expect a diverse range of terrain, blending coastal and mountainous landscapes. Trails include coastal singletracks, paths through pine forests, and rocky climbs. The region offers everything from easy, flat routes to demanding trails with significant elevation changes.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: Yes, Jávea/Xàbia has 12 easy mountain bike trails, perfect for beginners or those looking for a relaxed ride. These often include flat family routes through agricultural plains or along the coast.

Q: Where can I find challenging mountain bike trails in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: For experienced riders seeking a challenge, there are 28 difficult mountain bike trails. Many of these can be found in areas like the Montgó Natural Park, offering demanding ascents and technical descents with significant elevation gain. An example is &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e925824975/los-caminos-de-la-mar-circular-desde-cala-granadella-por-sendas-al-rio-gorgos" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Los Caminos de la Mar — Circular desde cala Granadella por sendas al Río Gorgos&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Which mountain bike trails offer the best scenic views in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: Many trails offer stunning views, particularly those around the coast and elevated areas. Routes near Cape San Antonio and Granadella Forest Park provide spectacular vistas of the Mediterranean. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38250509" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cala Blanca – Cap Negre Viewpoint loop from Xàbia / Jávea&lt;/a&gt; is known for its coastal views.

Q: What natural landmarks or attractions can I see while mountain biking in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: You can encounter several notable landmarks. The imposing Montgó Mountain offers panoramic views from its summit (&lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2211732" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Montgó Summit&lt;/a&gt;). The historic sea cave &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/68080" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cova Tallada (Cut Cave)&lt;/a&gt; is also accessible. Additionally, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/461688" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cap de Sant Antoni Lighthouse&lt;/a&gt; provides excellent coastal views.

Q: Are there family-friendly mountain bike trails in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: Yes, Jávea/Xàbia offers several family-friendly routes, often characterized by flatter terrain through agricultural plains or along the coast. These trails are generally easier and suitable for riders of all ages and skill levels.

Q: Are mountain bike trails in Jávea/Xàbia dog-friendly?
A: While many natural areas in Jávea/Xàbia are generally welcoming to dogs, it's always best to check specific trail regulations, especially within protected areas like Montgó Natural Park. Always keep dogs on a leash and ensure they are well-behaved and do not disturb wildlife or other trail users.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: Yes, many mountain bike routes in Jávea/Xàbia are designed as loops, allowing you to start and finish at the same point. Examples include the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/1673998" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cap de Sant Antoni viewpoint – Cap de Sant Antoni Lighthouse loop from Parque Villas&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40396301" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;View of Cala Granadella – Granadella Cove loop from Trenecito&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What do other mountain bikers enjoy the most about mountain biking in Jávea/Xàbia?
A: The area is highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.4 stars from over 90 reviews. Riders often praise the diverse landscapes, blending stunning coastal views with challenging mountainous terrain, and the extensive network of trails suitable for all skill levels.

Q: Are there options for mountain biking near the Granadella Forest Park?
A: Yes, the Granadella Forest Park is a popular area for mountain biking, offering an extensive network of trails through dense pine forests and along cliffs. These routes provide stunning views of the Mediterranean and Granadella Cove. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40396301" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;View of Cala Granadella – Granadella Cove loop from Trenecito&lt;/a&gt; is a good example in this area.
tips: A visit there is definitely worthwhile, if only for the magnificent view. Just take a short break, soak in the beautiful scenery, and capture the stunning perspectives. Cala Granadella is a beautiful little cove on the Costa Blanca near Jávea (Xàbia). The cove, with its crystal-clear, turquoise water, is surrounded by impressive cliffs and Mediterranean vegetation, offering a breathtaking natural setting. The beach consists of small pebbles rather than sand.
"Stone-Track" - often just earth. Relatively easy to drive.

A beautiful view over the coast of Xàbia (Valencian / Catalan) or Javea (Spanish) and the islands and rocks in front of it. Fascinating! 

As is often the case on the Costa Blanca, the afternoon is the right time for a beautiful view and photos at this viewpoint, as you then have the sun at your back. Otherwise you are looking into the sun and the photos look "slightly shady". 😉

A top location worth a visit. It offers fantastic views of the coast and the cliffs along the coastline. The road there is easy to navigate. The cape separates the bays of Alicante and Valencia and is surrounded by hidden coves and small islands. A striking landmark is the white lighthouse from 1928, which stands 120 meters above the sea and shines its light up to 23 nautical miles away. A visit is worthwhile not only for the impressive landscape, but also for the picturesque viewpoints that offer unforgettable panoramic views of the deep blue Mediterranean.
Undoubtedly the best views of the entire valley of the Marina Alta and Baja. Ideal to visit at sunset, you will see a unique sunset!
